description: SambaNova provides AI inference products including SambaCloud and SambaStack for running language models and agent-style workloads. Its public developer docs focus on model inference APIs, compatibility layers, and integrations with third-party coding tools and frameworks.
summary: SambaNova exposes one authenticated HTTP API surface for AI inference and agent endpoints on SambaCloud, documented with an OpenAPI spec at `https://app.stainless.com/api/spec/documented/sambanova/openapi.documented.yml`; no public GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or first-party CLI surface was found.
